changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.14
changeSet.comment: Create nexus.topics table mirroring SQLite catalog_taxonomy.py schema with tenant_id
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE nexus.topics ( id BIGSERIAL NOT NULL, tenant_id TEXT NOT NULL, label TEXT NOT NULL, parent_id BIGINT, collection TEXT NOT NULL, centroid_hash TEXT, doc_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, review_status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending', terms TEXT, CONSTRAINT topics_pk PRIMARY KEY (id), -- Self-referential FK for parent-child hierarchy (soft, same table) CONSTRAINT topics_parent_fk FOREIGN KEY (parent_id) REFERENCES nexus.topics(id) ON DELETE SET NULL );
-- Index matching query patterns: get_topics/get_all_topics/get_topics_for_collection -- all query by (tenant_id, collection) + ORDER BY doc_count DESC CREATE INDEX idx_topics_tenant_collection ON nexus.topics (tenant_id, collection); CREATE INDEX idx_topics_tenant_collection_count ON nexus.topics (tenant_id, collection, doc_count DESC); -- Exact label lookup (resolve_label, get_doc_ids_for_topic via join) CREATE INDEX idx_topics_tenant_label ON nexus.topics (tenant_id, label); -- Review workflow: get_unreviewed_topics CREATE INDEX idx_topics_tenant_review_status ON nexus.topics (tenant_id, review_status); -- Parent traversal: get_topic_tree CREATE INDEX idx_topics_tenant_parent ON nexus.topics (tenant_id, parent_id);
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.topics CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.14
changeSet.comment: Create nexus.taxonomy_meta table mirroring SQLite schema with tenant_id
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.taxonomy_meta CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.14
changeSet.comment: Create nexus.topic_assignments table mirroring SQLite schema with tenant_id
changeSet.sql:
-- NOTE: doc_id is a plain TEXT column referencing catalog doc tumblers. -- NOT an enforced FK — soft ref until nexus-b7v6i (.18+ gate). CREATE TABLE nexus.topic_assignments ( tenant_id TEXT NOT NULL, doc_id TEXT NOT NULL, topic_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES nexus.topics(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, assigned_by TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'hdbscan', similarity DOUBLE PRECISION, assigned_at TIMESTAMPTZ, source_collection TEXT, CONSTRAINT topic_assignments_pk PRIMARY KEY (tenant_id, doc_id, topic_id) );
-- Query patterns: -- compute_icf_map: WHERE assigned_by='projection' AND source_collection IS NOT NULL CREATE INDEX idx_ta_tenant_by_source ON nexus.topic_assignments (tenant_id, assigned_by, source_collection); -- get_assignments_for_docs: doc_id IN (...) CREATE INDEX idx_ta_tenant_doc_id ON nexus.topic_assignments (tenant_id, doc_id); -- get_topic_docs / get_topic_doc_ids: WHERE topic_id = ? CREATE INDEX idx_ta_tenant_topic_id ON nexus.topic_assignments (tenant_id, topic_id); -- purge_assignments_for_doc: doc_id = ? AND topic_id IN (...) CREATE INDEX idx_ta_tenant_doc_topic ON nexus.topic_assignments (tenant_id, doc_id, topic_id);
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.topic_assignments CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.14
changeSet.comment: Create nexus.topic_links table mirroring SQLite schema with tenant_id
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.topic_links CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.14
changeSet.comment: Enable and FORCE RLS + tenant_isolation policy on all 4 taxonomy tables

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.14
changeSet.comment: Grant table privileges to nexus_svc role (idempotent)
